# Version 4.151.0
> **Skia m151 and allocation-free hot paths** · [NuGet (prerelease)](https://www.nuget.org/packages/SkiaSharp/4.151.0-preview)

> **API changes** · [SkiaSharp API diff](4.151.0/index.md) · [HarfBuzzSharp API diff](harfbuzzsharp/14.2.1/index.md)

## Highlights

SkiaSharp 4.151.0 preview updates to Skia m151 and eliminates per-call allocations across SKShaper and HarfBuzzSharp. The bundled Skia engine advances to m151 with upstream bug fixes. A series of targeted performance improvements make SKFourByteTag parsing, SKColor hex parsing, and SKShaper glyph access allocation-free. HarfBuzzSharp gains pooled UTF-8 encoding and zero-allocation tag parsing. A WASM build compatibility fix is also included.

## Breaking Changes

*None in this preview line.*

## Engine

- **Skia updated to milestone m151** — The bundled Skia engine advances to m151, bringing upstream rendering improvements and bug fixes. ([#4294](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/4294))
- **Upstream m151 bug fixes merged** — Additional cherry-picked fixes from the Skia chrome/m151 branch have been merged for improved stability. ([#4312](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/4312), [#4382](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/4382))
- **WASM build compatibility restored** — A redefined SK_BUILD_FOR_WASM preprocessor symbol that broke WASM builds has been removed from the Skia submodule. — ❤️ [@ramezgerges](https://github.com/ramezgerges) ([#3788](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/3788))

## API Surface

- **SKColor hex parsing optimised with ReadOnlySpan<char> overloads** — SKColor.Parse and TryParse now accept ReadOnlySpan<char>, and the internal hex-to-byte conversion avoids allocations on the hot path. ([#4345](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/4345))
- **SKShaper glyph results exposed as zero-copy spans** — SKShaper now surfaces glyph result arrays as ReadOnlySpan slices, eliminating the per-call array copy when reading shaping output. ([#4388](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/4388))
- **SKFourByteTag parsing made allocation-free** — SKFourByteTag.Parse no longer allocates a temporary char[4] array on every call; the four-byte tag is decoded directly from the integer value. ([#4396](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/4396))
- **GRContextOptions unsafe modifier removed** — The unnecessary unsafe modifier has been removed from GRContextOptions, making the type usable in projects that do not allow unsafe code. ([#3991](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/3991))

## HarfBuzzSharp 14.2.1

Two allocation-free performance improvements: Buffer.AddUtf8(string) now uses a pooled UTF-8 encoder to avoid per-call byte[] allocation, and Tag.Parse no longer allocates a temporary char[4] array.

## Community Contributors ❤️

Thank you to everyone who contributed to this release!

| Contributor | Contributions |
|-------------|---------------|
| [@ramezgerges](https://github.com/ramezgerges) | Fixed the WASM SK_BUILD_FOR_WASM preprocessor redefinition and added a cross-backend golden-image visual regression test harness ([#3788](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/3788), [#4340](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/pull/4340)) |

## Preview 1 (July 2, 2026)

Preview 1 updated the bundled Skia engine to milestone m151, restored WASM build compatibility, added SKColor ReadOnlySpan overloads and SKShaper zero-copy span access, and made SKFourByteTag parsing allocation-free.

[Full changelog](https://github.com/mono/SkiaSharp/compare/v4.150.0...v4.151.0-preview.1.1)
